_doc: KPI Source Registry (Phase 5, 2026-06-10). One metric -> ONE official derivation. validate_kpi_source_registry.py enforces: every consumer references an allowed source (comment-stripped), no consumer matches a forbidden pattern, and every view.column here exists in the live DB. Derivations were ESTABLISHED by the 2026-06-09/10 parity audits (see ROADMAP_pm_analytics_canonical_2026-06-10.md) - do not edit a derivation without re-running the cross-page parity audit.

pm_overdue.definition: Assets with >=1 frequency-aware overdue scope item (distinct pm_asset_id roll-up)

forbidden.why: v_pm_compliance_truth.is_due is the retired flat-30-day proxy (F4-class: home showed 26 vs pm-scheduler 4). Overdue tiles read frequency-aware is_overdue. Edge-fn consumers added 2026-06-13 (S1/P1/P10): shift-planner pms_due + ai-orchestrator PM agent both repointed off the flat-30 proxy.

pm_due_soon.definition: Assets/scope items flagged frequency-aware due-soon (next_due within 14 days, not overdue); distinct pm_asset_id roll-up

forbidden.why: v_pm_compliance_truth.is_due is the retired flat-30-day proxy (conflates due + overdue); due-soon is the frequency-aware is_due_soon (next_due within 14 days).

pm_compliance.definition: SMRP on-time PM completion rate (completions within window / scheduled), canonical RPC

forbidden.why: Local ontrack/total ratio is the pre-canonical derivation (showed 0%/60% vs SMRP 88.5%).

low_stock.definition: Inventory items at/below threshold, server-derived flag

top_risk_band.definition: Action-list surfaces ('top risk this shift' / 'needs attention now') show high+critical bands only (critical>=0.85, high>=0.70)

forbidden.why: Top-N by score WITHOUT a band filter listed low/medium assets as 'top risk this shift' (cried wolf; fixed 2026-06-10).
